effects.effect: Your Opponent's Action cards cost +1 FP until the end of this turn.

effects.name: Venomous Ambush
effects.effect: After a Vivosaurs is Unrested: Target a Vivosaur either player controls; Apply Poison to that Vivosaur.

effects.name: Toxic Assault
effects.effect: Remove all Poison Statuses Applied to all Vivosaurs and apply the effect.
